title: About
text:
This is a test page for exploring and demonstrating trends in CO2 reduction reaction (CO2RR) experimental data. The current site is intended as a demo for interactive visualization rather than a finalized public database.
For questions or feedback, please contact: fengwang.li@sydney.edu.au


This demo is adapted from the datapage and LEVANTE datapage projects:

https://github.com/datapages/datapage
https://github.com/levante-framework/levante-datapage

title: Source Data
CO2RR Experimental Database
Potential Dependence
Data
text:
Data
Our full database is constructed by using AI to periodically retrieve recently published CO2RR papers. Due to limitations in full-text access and current AI models, some entries in the database may be incomplete or contain errors. Please verify the information independently before use.
You can also access the database here, where more filters and SQL queries are supported. The chart data shown on other pages are selected samples from this database, chosen based on data completeness and the significance of the reported results.
